high_fidelity_structure: 390x844 portrait commerce home with a warm off-white status area and dense white content canvas. Top order: compact status bar; horizontally clipped category tab row with the second tab active in orange and a short orange underline; rounded orange-outline search field with scan icon at left, query text, camera icon, and solid orange search button. Beneath it is a 5-column, 2-row shortcut icon grid, followed by a tiny two-dot pager indicator. A three-card promotional row sits below, each pale blush card containing a bold heading, colorful product illustration, and bright price/action pill. Then a full-width red announcement coupon strip with a speaker icon and white redeem button. The main recommendation area is a two-column masonry product feed with large rounded image blocks, multi-line product labels, and compact metadata. A fixed white bottom navigation spans the screen, with five evenly distributed icon-and-label items; the first is orange-active, the center messages item has a small orange notification badge, and the cart item is a primary interaction entry. No modal or drawer is visible. Visual density is high, with narrow gutters, 8-12px card radii, strong orange/red accents, black charcoal typography, and frequent iconography.

replaced_source_assets.product_photos: Locally rendered abstract illustrations: smart desktop bot dock, mirrored music kiosk, compact game controller, snack sandwich, yellow service robot
replaced_source_assets.source_wording: All source labels, tabs, promotion text, and navigation labels replaced with fictional Chinese marketplace copy.

components.geometry: 28-76px, horizontally scrollable; active tab second position
20px side margins, 36px high, orange border; includes scan, text input, camera, submit
full-width red strip, 42px tall, white action button at right
16px side margins, 8px gutter, rounded image-first cards
small orange badge attached to messages/cart navigation area
compact orange control within each product card or product detail state
small local validation/result area shown after interaction, not initially emphasized

inferred_interactions.trigger: tap a top tab or shortcut category
inferred_interactions.behavior: switch active orange state and replace the two-column recommendation feed with the chosen fictional category; preserve the page structure.
show fictional matching items in recommendation-list and update a small qa-result status with the query.
change banner state to claimed and update its call-to-action text.

inferred_interactions.trigger: tap add-to-cart on a recommendation card
inferred_interactions.behavior: increment cart-count, animate or highlight the cart tab, and update qa-result with a local confirmation.
set cart tab active and show a compact local cart summary view or count state.

typography.font_family: system-ui, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
